description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named vs2019 that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests to master. Run three parallel jobs on a Windows 2019 environment: build-windows-vs2019-stl, build-windows-vs2019-no-stl, and build-windows-vs2019-stl-force-cpp03. Each job checks out the repository with submodules, sets up msbuild, builds with cmake and MSBuild, and runs tests with etl_tests.exe, varying in STL usage and C++ version.
